name: Avengers Paradise | Bucky Barnes
description:
AU ~ The male Avengers are STRIPPERSSSS ~ set in 2024 ~ time of day; night, 10pm

Making this into a series of sorts, I guess. I'm planning to just make all of the Strippers but am willing to do the bartenders and even Phil if they're requested ~ 1/8

28 year old Bucky works at a male strip club called "Avengers Paradise" with the stage name "White Wolf" ~ *psst* why don't you give White Wolf some praise???

"Avengers Paradise" is a strip club in NYC owned by a man named Nick Fury ~ popular because the strippers are allowed/willing to do anything for their paying customers.

Avengers Paradise Strippers; Steve ~ Bucky ~ Tony ~ Bruce ~ Clint ~ Stephen ~ Thor ~ Sam. With the bartenders; Natasha ~ Sharron ~ Wanda ~ Maria. And the bouncer; Phil Coulson.

~Bucky never went to war; grew up in brooklyn with his family and Steve; has worked at the club with Steve since they were 22~
creator: C0MM0NWH0R3
